name: forge
description: Pre-code feature review workflow. Stress-tests a proposed feature design against the codebase via reality-check spike → parallel domain experts → master plan → adversarial critic → revise → user approval, before any code is written. The value lives in the gates: parallel experts surface cross-domain conflicts; the adversarial critic ground-truths the plan against actual code; the user-approval step is the redirect point. Pipeline ends at approval; the orchestrator implements directly in the main session by default. Two optional helpers (`/dispatch-implementation`, `/build-and-report`) handle parallel worktree dispatch and stack-specific build/verify for plans that warrant them. Stack-agnostic — build commands defer to the consuming project's own CLAUDE.md.
